primary_sources.title: Letters Patent of Appointment of Prime Minister, 1 March 2020 (post-Sheraton Move)
Letters Patent of Appointment as DPM, 9 April 2009 (Najib cabinet)
Comprehensive Sheraton Move documentation: Malaysiakini, The Edge, Free Malaysia Today, February-March 2020

notes: 8th PM. Sacked by Najib as DPM 2015 over 1MDB criticism; co-founded Bersatu 2016 with Mahathir. Backbone of the Sheraton Move (February 2020) that brought down PH government. Premier 1 March 2020 to 16 August 2021 — shortest tenure since independence. Lost confidence vote July 2021; resigned. Anchors PN coalition (Bersatu + PAS) since.
